content:
{
  "mnemonics": [
    "M" + "end with First Come First Served",
    "P" + "repare deadlocks before proceeding"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "First Come First Served (FCFS): A simple and fair method, but may lead to longer waiting times for the lock owner.",
    "Priority Scheduling: Assign priority to the threads holding the deadlock, and proceed with the highest priority thread.",
    "Preemptive Scheduling: Periodically check for deadlocks and remove the thread holding the deadlock if it is wait
